zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtred於1291年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾斯卡波洛時，他的父親Robert Ughtred27歲，母親Isabel Steeton20歲。他於1328年1月29日與Margaret Burdon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1365年5月12日在英國英格蘭越可爾勒夫 卡頓享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾勒夫 卡頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtred于1291年出生在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾斯卡波洛时，他的父亲Robert Ughtred27岁，母亲Isabel Steeton20岁。他于1328年1月29日与Margaret Burdon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1365年5月12日在英国英格兰越可爾勒夫 卡頓享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾勒夫 卡頓。

nameMeanings.name: Ughtred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Outred
meanings: English: (i) relationship name from the Middle English personal name Utred, Oughtred (Old English Ūhtrǣd, a compound of ūht of unknown meaning + rǣd ‘advice’). (ii) the name may sometimes have been confused with, or be a phonetic variant of Outridge . Compare George Outrid, 1682, with George Outridge, 1685 in IGI (Cuckfield, Sussex).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtred was born in 1291, in Scarborough, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Ughtred, was 27 and his mother, Isabel Steeton, was 20. He married Margaret Burdon on 29 January 1328. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 12 May 1365, in Low Catton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Low Catton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtred est né en 1291, à Scarborough, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Ughtred, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabel Steeton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Burdon le 29 janvier 1328. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 mai 1365, à Low Catton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Low Catton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtred 1291 in Scarborough, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Ughtred 27 und seine Mutter Isabel Steeton 20. Er hat am 29. Januar 1328 Margaret Burdon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Mai 1365 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Low Catton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Low Catton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtred è nato il nel 1291 nel Scarborough, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Ughtred, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Steeton, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Burdon il 29 gennaio 1328. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtredが1291年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスカーボロウで生まれた時，父Robert Ughtredは27歳，母Isabel Steetonは20歳であった。1328年1月29日にMargaret Burdonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1365年5月12日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアロウ カットオンで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアロウ カットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtred(이)가 1291년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스카버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Ughtred(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Steeton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1328년 1월 29일 Margaret Burdon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1365년 5월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 로 카턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 로 카턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtred nasceu em 1291, em Scarborough, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Ughtred, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Steeton, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Burdon em 29 de janeiro de 1328. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de maio de 1365, em Low Catton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Low Catton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Ughtred 1st Baron Ughtred родился в 1291 г. в местности скарбороую, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Ughtred было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Steeton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Burdon 29 января 1328 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 мая 1365 г. в местности лоу каттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности лоу каттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
